steps.title: Find the value of the variable
steps.content:
Divide both sides of $5x=55$ by $5$ to isolate the variable:
$$x=11$$

steps.title: Evaluate the requested expression
steps.content:
Substitute $x=11$ into the expression the question asks for:
$$6x+4=6(11)+4=66+4=70$$

steps.title: Select the matching value
steps.content: The computed value of $6x+4$ is $70$, which appears in the choices. The answer is A.
